top_signals.title: David Zahn Called the Gilt Rout. Now He’s Set to Buy at 6%
top_signals.summary: David Zahn is looking vindicated. He’s been shunning UK bonds for more than a year, when other fund managers were piling in after selloffs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan to survey bear habitats in Niigata and Tohoku region
top_signals.summary: The government surveys aim to gain a better understanding of bear behavior in wide areas, as bears often roam across prefectural borders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
